info.name: Mesoco Dental Asset Management API
info.description:
API collection for Mesoco Dental Asset Management System.

Organized by development phases.

**How to use:**
1. Import this collection
2. Import environment (Local or Docker)
3. Select environment from dropdown
4. Run requests in order within each phase

exec: // Get base URL for Origin/Referer headers
// Always set required headers for Sanctum SPA authentication

item.name: PHASE 1 - Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints: Login, Logout, Forgot Password, Change Password

request.description: Get Sanctum CSRF cookie. Must be called before any state-changing request.
Login with employee code and password. Only employee_code is accepted (not email).
Get currently authenticated user info. Requires authenticated session.
Request password reset OTP. DEV: Check storage/app/private/otp/password_reset_codes.log
Reset password using OTP. Uses password + password_confirmation (NOT new_password).
Change password for authenticated user. Uses password + password_confirmation (NOT new_password).
Logout and invalidate session.

item.name: PHASE 2 - RBAC + Profile
item.description:
Profile management, Employee CRUD (Admin/HR), User/Roles management (Admin/HR).

Test roles: admin, hr, doctor, technician, employee.

**RBAC Tests:**
- 403 tests prove backend-enforced authorization
- 422 tests prove immutable fields are rejected

item.name: Profile
item.description: View and edit own profile. All authenticated users.

request.description: Get authenticated user profile. Returns employee data linked to user.
Update profile with allowed fields only.
MUST return 422 - employee_code is immutable.
MUST return 422 - email is immutable.

item.name: Employees (Admin/HR)
item.description: Employee management. Requires admin or hr role.

request.description: List employees with optional filtering. Admin/HR only.
Get employees without user accounts (for Add Employee popup).
Create a new employee. Admin/HR only.
Get specific employee details.
Update employee. Admin/HR only.
Delete employee. Cannot delete if has user account.

item.name: 7. RBAC Test: Doctor cannot list employees → 403

request.description: Test RBAC: Non-admin roles should get 403. Login as doctor first.

exec: // Run this after logging in as doctor

item.name: Users / Roles & Permission (Admin/HR)
item.description: User account management. Requires admin or hr role.

request.description: List users with filtering. Columns: employee_code, name, role.
Get list of available roles for dropdown.
Create user account for an employee. Sets must_change_password=true.
Get specific user details.
Update only the role. employee_code and name are read-only.
MUST return 422 - name is not editable.
MUST return 422 - employee_code is not editable.
Delete user account. Cannot delete yourself.

item.name: 9. RBAC Test: Doctor cannot list users → 403

request.description: Test RBAC: Non-admin roles should get 403. Login as doctor first.

exec: // Run this after logging in as doctor

item.name: 10. RBAC Test: Technician cannot create user → 403

request.description: Test RBAC: Non-admin roles should get 403. Login as technician first.

exec: // Run this after logging in as technician

item.name: PHASE 3 - Assets + Assignment + QR
item.description:
Asset management, Assignment workflow, QR code resolution.

**Asset Types:** tray, machine, tool, equipment, other
**Asset Statuses:** active, off_service, maintenance, retired

**QR Format v1:** MESOCO|ASSET|v1|<uuid>

**RBAC:**
- Admin/HR: full CRUD + assign/unassign
- Others: view assigned assets + resolve QR

item.name: Assets (Admin/HR)
item.description: Asset management. Requires admin or hr role.

request.description: List assets with optional filtering. Admin/HR see all, others see only assigned.
Get active assets not currently assigned.
Create a new asset. Admin/HR only.
Get specific asset details.
Update asset. Admin/HR only.
Assign asset to employee. Only 1 active assignee per asset.
Try to assign already assigned asset. Should return 422 with ALREADY_ASSIGNED error.
Unassign asset from current employee.
Generate new QR identity for asset. Old QR becomes invalid.
Delete asset. Cannot delete if currently assigned.

item.name: QR Resolve
item.description: QR code resolution. All authenticated users can resolve QR codes.

request.description: Resolve QR payload to get asset and assignee info.
Invalid QR format should return 422.
Non-existent QR should return 404.

item.name: RBAC Tests (Non-Admin)
item.description: Test that non-admin users cannot manage assets.

item.name: 1. Doctor can view own assigned assets

request.description: Login as doctor first. Should see only assigned assets.
Login as doctor first. Should get 403.
Login as doctor first. Should get 403.
Login as doctor first. All users can resolve QR.

item.name: PHASE 4 - Asset Tracking (Timesheet)
item.description:
Asset check-in/check-out, Shift management.

**Shifts:** Morning (06-12), Afternoon (12-18), Evening (18-22)

**Check-in Rules:**
- Only assignee or admin can check-in
- One check-in per asset per shift per day
- Off-service assets cannot be checked in

**Instructions:**
- Assets can have instructions_url (URL to documentation)
- QR resolve returns instructions object

item.name: Shifts
item.description: View available shifts. All authenticated users.

request.description: List all active shifts with current shift indicator.

item.name: Check-ins
item.description: Asset check-in/check-out. All authenticated users can check-in their assigned assets.

request.description: Check-in an assigned asset. Auto-detects current shift if not specified.
Get own check-ins. Optional date filter (YYYY-MM-DD).
Check-out from a check-in.

item.name: QR Resolve with Check-in
item.description: QR resolve now includes check-in actions

request.description: QR resolve now returns check-in status and available actions
